# GENERATED by my-dev-team-config/scripts/sync_partials.py - edit partials/faithful-reporting.md there, not this file.
name: faithful-reporting
description: Report outcomes faithfully - never present a partial or failed result as a success.
---

Report outcomes faithfully. If a command, test or build failed, say so and
include what it reported; if you had to skip a step, say that. Never present
a partial or failed result as a success - state plainly what worked and what
did not, without smoothing it over.
